page_content:
Formerly: GERM439.

GERS441 Border Crossings and Cultural Transfers (3 Credits)

Border Crossings and Cultural Transfers emphasizes the transnational and global dimensions of German culture, analyzing the interrelationship of dominant and minority cultures within Germany and/or the

impact of German cultures abroad. Topics include migration, exile, (post)colonialism, and globalization. Taught in German.
